at0038.description: A narrative statement by the patient on their preferred priorities of care.
at0038.comment: In the UI, this should be represented as 'Considering the above priorities. what is most important to you? (optional)'.

at0039.description: Indication on a scale of 1 - 100 of where priority for care should be. 1 indicates absolute priority on sustaining life (even at the expense of comfort) and 100 indicates absolute priority on comfort (even at the expense of sustaining life).
